title: Data and Statistics
blurb: Placeholder — organize data in tables and graphs; find mean, median, mode, and range.

lessons.title: Data and Statistics
lessons.concreteComparison: Placeholder — real-world opener authored in Step 3. Example: tracking daily temperatures for a week and finding the average gives a measure of typical weather.
lessons.objective: Placeholder — calculate the mean, median, mode, and range of a data set.
concept: Placeholder concept paragraph. The mean is the sum divided by the count. The median is the middle value when sorted. The mode is the most frequent value.

workedExamples.statement: Placeholder problem. Find the mean of $4, 7, 2, 9, 3$.

tryIt.statement: Placeholder try-it. Find the median of $3, 8, 1, 6, 4$.

practice.statement: Placeholder practice problem. Find the range of $12, 5, 20, 8, 15$.

testYourself.statement: Placeholder test problem. A student scored $72, 85, 90, 68, 75$ on five tests. Find the mean.
